title: erigeron variifolius
intro: Erigeron variifolius, also known as Varied-leaved Fleabane, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Erigeron variifolius include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Erigeron variifolius can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used topically as a poultice or salve to treat skin conditions and wounds.
